str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed within 3 business days of forming suspicion. Licensed digital asset operators supervised by SEC Thailand are reporting entities under the Anti-Money Laundering Act B.E. 2542 (1999). Filed via AMLO's electronic reporting system.

ctr.notes: Transaction reports required for cash transactions of THB 2,000,000 or more, or property transfers of THB 5,000,000 or more. Must be filed within 30 days.
